id: 千里送鹅毛，礼轻情意重
sourceText: 千里送鹅毛，礼轻情意重
title: 千里送鹅毛，礼轻情意重
meaning: 虽然礼物很轻很便宜，但是从很远的地方送来的，代表的情意是非常珍贵的。

scenes.title: 远方的朋友
scenes.description: mountains and long road visible through window, thoughtful expression, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.prompt: A young boy in ancient Chinese clothing looking at a photo of his friend, mountains and long road visible through window, thoughtful expression, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.narration: 小明住在一个很远的地方，他的好朋友小红要过生日了。

scenes.title: 带着礼物出发
scenes.description: carrying a single beautiful white goose feather wrapped in red cloth, determination on his face, scenic landscape, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.prompt: A boy walking along a winding path through mountains, carrying a single beautiful white goose feather wrapped in red cloth, determination on his face, scenic landscape, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.narration: 小明带着一根漂亮的鹅毛，走了很远很远的路去看小红。

scenes.title: 到达目的地
scenes.description: both smiling, simple birthday setting, emotional moment, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.prompt: A tired but happy boy presenting a single white goose feather to a surprised girl, both smiling, simple birthday setting, emotional moment, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book.
scenes.narration: 小明终于到了，衣服都走破了，但他小心翼翼地拿出鹅毛送给小红。

scenes.title: 情意最珍贵
scenes.description: tears of joy, the white goose feather displayed on a shelf like treasure, hearts floating around, warm light, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book, heartwarming scene.
scenes.prompt: The girl hugging the boy, tears of joy, the white goose feather displayed on a shelf like treasure, hearts floating around, warm light, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, children book, heartwarming scene.
scenes.narration: 小红感动得哭了，虽然只是一根鹅毛，但这份情谊比什么都珍贵！
